resposta:
solution: ```class Solution:
    def reverseWords(self, s: str) -> str:
        return ' '.join(reversed(s.split()))
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Split the string on any whitespace (split() without arguments collapses multiple spaces), reverse the resulting list of words, then join with single spaces. Simple, fast, and leverages Python’s optimized built-ins.
